case_title: CLASSIC DENTAL ARTS VS OLD TOWN DENTAL GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLD TOWN DENTAL GROUP MASSEY MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
